packageRules.description: Group all Cargo updates and prefix their commits.
HashiCorp Vault version bumps: separate, labelled PR that must be verified locally (the integration suite needs a real Vault) before merging.
prBodyNotes: ⚠️ Verify locally against a real Vault before merging: run the full suite against this version (e.g. a throwaway `vault:<version>` dev container), since the integration tests exercise a live server.

customManagers.description: Track the highest HashiCorp Vault version pinned in the CI test matrix.

lockFileMaintenance._comment: Cargo.lock is gitignored in this repo, so there is no lockfile to maintain.
